creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
I'm sorry, this may be irrelevant -- just want to know if anyone else here has the same problem. Will file a bug when I come up with something useful.

The command line, most noticeably in search mode, skips one character every 4..10 keystrokes. Does not affect pasting -- but it does ignore Ctrl-V or Shift-Insert in the same manner, so it must be somewhere in input handling.

The problem has been there for all my use of use zathura, which is 2-3 releases, but last time I checked, nobody on the developers' IRC was aware or had experienced this.
